body.title: PROC_WORK_TICKET + needs_review workflow for Igor self-coding
body.result: Seeded PROC_CODE_A_TICKET (with review gate steps 8-10), PROC_APPROVE_CHANGE, PROC_CHECK_IGOR_QUEUE. worker field + needs_review status live in cc_queue. 567 tests pass.
body.description: Seed PROC_WORK_TICKET habit: reads cc_queue ticket (worker=igor), implements via patch_source_file, runs tests, posts diff summary to channel, marks ticket needs_review. Seed PROC_APPROVE_CHANGE: fires on approved/looks good/commit that -> commits. Add needs_review status to cc_queue. Add worker field to ticket schema. Igor never self-initiates restart.
